name: Mathstral 7B
tagline: 7B model specialised for STEM/math reasoning, Apache 2.
metaDescription: Mathstral 7B (Mistral AI), released 2024-07-16 — part of the Specialist open models (Mathstral / Codestral Mamba) line. 7B model specialised for STEM/math reas…
overview: Mathstral 7B is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Specialist open models (Mathstral / Codestral Mamba) line. Released 2024-07-16. One-off open-weight research models for math and efficient long-context code.
What's notable in this version: 7B model specialised for STEM/math reasoning, Apache 2.0.
